name: Perez-Sudarsky unimodular diffusion
killed_K: K2 |wa|~0 (full ODE collapses to LCDM at alpha_Q=0)
K10 full-ODE disagrees with L3 toy (L3 closed-form ansatz is linear expansion, not the integrated source J^0)
note: L4 full ODE integration of Perez-Sudarsky continuity with J^0 = alpha_Q rho_c0 (H/H0) drives chi^2 strictly worse than LCDM for alpha_Q > 0 in the fit window (Om in [0.28, 0.38], h in [0.64, 0.71]).  Example: at Om=0.35 h=0.64 alpha_Q=0.094 the full ODE gives chi^2 = 2643.8, whereas the L3 linearised closed-form gave chi^2 = 1667.1.  The L3 toy substituted (1 - alpha_Q (1 - a^3)) for the true exp-like integral of the diffusion source, which under-estimated the matter depletion at intermediate redshifts by roughly an order of magnitude.  This is a genuine K10 failure: the toy misrepresented the full-background behaviour.
